name: Community Link
description_short: Community Link Federal Credit Union is a member-owned financial institution serving Huntington, IN with comprehensive banking, lending, and investment services tailored to personal and business needs.
description_long:
Community Link Federal Credit Union operates as a federally chartered credit union based in Huntington, Indiana, serving the local community and surrounding service areas. As a member-owned cooperative financial institution, it is regulated by the National Credit Union Administration (NCUA) and operates under credit union principles of member benefit and financial accessibility.

The institution offers a comprehensive suite of financial services spanning retail banking, lending, savings products, and investment planning. Core offerings include high-yield checking and savings accounts, flexible auto loans and mortgage options, business loans with personalized support, money market accounts, share certificates (CDs), IRA/KEOGH retirement accounts, and expert investment and retirement planning services. Digital capabilities include mobile banking, online bill pay, remote deposit capture, loan applications, online loan payments, e-statements, and electronic signature services.

Community Link differentiates itself through its credit union structure, which emphasizes member benefits and competitive rates rather than shareholder profits. The institution provides dedicated financial planning and wealth management services alongside robust digital banking infrastructure. Member-exclusive benefits and discounts are highlighted as part of the value proposition, and the institution maintains transparent NCUA reporting with specific account holder data (3,041 share savings accounts, 245 CDs, 57 IRA accounts, and 23 money market accounts).

As a community-focused credit union, Community Link serves a defined membership base in Huntington, IN and surrounding areas. The institution is legitimate and federally regulated, making it a reliable choice for members seeking traditional banking and lending services. However, availability is geographically limited to their service areas, and the range of specialized financial products may be narrower than larger regional or national banks. Many banks offer installment loans with fixed monthly payments, giving borrowers a clear payoff timeline.
services: Money market accounts with flexible access
IRA and KEOGH retirement planning accounts
Flexible auto loans and mortgage financing
Mobile banking and digital wallet access
Online and mobile bill pay services
pros: NCUA-regulated federal credit union with transparent financial reporting and member account data published
Competitive rates on savings accounts, money market accounts, and certificates of deposit (CDs)
Comprehensive digital banking suite including mobile app, remote deposit capture, and online bill pay
Dedicated financial planning and wealth management services included for members
Business loans available with flexible financing and personalized support for local business growth
Low-minimum balance share certificates (CDs) for accessible long-term savings
Member-exclusive benefits, discounts, and credit union ownership structure that prioritizes member welfare
cons: Geographically limited service area restricted to Huntington, IN and defined service regions; not available nationwide
Limited information provided about specific interest rates, loan terms, APRs, or fee schedules on the website
No mention of specialized products like secured credit cards, credit builder loans, or credit repair services
Website lacks details on membership eligibility requirements or account opening minimums beyond 'low-minimum' CDs
No information about payday loan alternatives (PALs) or emergency lending products despite credit union focus
best_for: Huntington, IN residents and businesses seeking comprehensive banking with competitive credit union rates
Members wanting personalized financial planning and wealth management alongside everyday banking
Small business owners in the service area needing flexible business loans with local support
Savers and investors seeking competitive returns on savings accounts, CDs, and retirement accounts
diagnosis: Community Link Federal Credit Union is best for Huntington, IN residents and local businesses seeking traditional banking, lending, and investment services with competitive credit union rates and personalized service. The primary caveat is geographic limitation—membership is restricted to their defined service area, making it unavailable to those outside Huntington, IN and surrounding regions. Additionally, the website does not detail specific rates, fees, or eligibility requirements, requiring direct contact for accurate pricing information.
typical_results_timeline: Membership approval and account opening typically takes 1-3 business days. Loan decisions are usually faster than traditional banks.
